name: Hydroponics Cycle Manager
info:
Purpose

Maintains the state of an active outside hydroponics control cycle.

The Cycle Manager groups multiple hardware events into a single logical
operation and determines whether the completed operation represents an:

• Auto Fill - Auto Dose cycle
• Manual Fill - Auto Dose cycle
• ESP-Override dose cycle

Responsibilities

• Creates a new cycle when the first device starts.
• Tracks whether water fill, Pump A, and Pump B participated.
• Captures the control mode at cycle start.
• Preserves a single pending cycle object throughout the operation.
• Generates capture requests for:
  - Before-cycle measurements
  - Fill completion
  - Dose A completion
  - Dose B completion
• Classifies the final event as FILL or DOSE.
• Provides the pending cycle to downstream logging and notification nodes.

Revision History

2026-07-10  GAL
• ISSUE-006 logging isolation work started.
• Added delay_tds_capture to each cycle:
  - Auto and Manual cycles use delayed post-mixing TDS capture.
  - ESP-Override cycles are marked for immediate logging.
• Added msg.immediate_log on completed ESP-Override actions.
• Added msg.finalize_cycle to determine when a completed hardware action
  should be snapshotted and released:
  - Every ESP-Override action finalizes immediately.
  - Auto and Manual cycles finalize when Pump B completes.
• Establishes separate handling for independent ESP-Override fill,
  Pump A, and Pump B events without forcing them into one grouped cycle.

2026-07-06  GAL
• Updated controller operating mode terminology:
  - Auto Fill - Auto Dose
  - Manual Fill - Auto Dose
  - ESP-Override
• normalizeMode() updated to recognize the new Home Assistant
  control mode names while retaining backward compatibility
  with the legacy "Auto" and "Manual" values.
• Notification titles are now selected using both the controller
  operating mode and the completed event type (FILL or DOSE),
  allowing accurate user-facing notifications for each cycle.

2026-07-05  GAL
• Introduced unified pending cycle object.
• FILL cycles take precedence when water and dosing occur
  during the same operation.
• Captures HA control mode at cycle start instead of using
  hardcoded values.
• Added before/fill/dose capture flags for downstream
  processing.

2026-06-30  GAL
• Initial implementation.

name: Save Before Values to Cycle
debug Save Before Values to Cycle
Save Gal Added
Save Dose A
Save Dose B
Save TDS After
Build Cycle INSERT SQL
info:
Purpose

Builds the MariaDB INSERT statement for one completed hydroponics
fill or dose cycle.

Uses the completed cycle snapshot carried in msg.completed_cycle
instead of the shared flow.outside_pending_cycle object.

This prevents a later maintenance dose from overwriting or merging
with an earlier completed cycle while the earlier cycle is waiting
for its post-mixing TDS reading.

Revision History

2026-07-10  GAL
• ISSUE-006 logging isolation fix.
• Changed cycle source from flow.outside_pending_cycle to
  msg.completed_cycle.
• Each completed physical cycle now retains its own independent
  data through the 10-minute mixing delay.
• Prevents overlapping maintenance doses from being merged into
  one maintenance_log record.

name: Clear Pending Cycle
info:
Purpose

Finalizes the delayed logging and notification path for one completed
hydroponics cycle.

The shared flow.outside_pending_cycle slot is released earlier by the
Snapshot Completed Cycle node.

This node must not clear shared cycle state because a newer cycle may
already be active by the time the 10-minute mixing delay completes.

Revision History

2026-07-10  GAL
• ISSUE-006 logging isolation fix.
• Removed clearing of flow.outside_pending_cycle and
  flow.outside_cycle_active from this delayed node.
• Prevents an older completed cycle from clearing a newer active cycle.

name: Build Notification Text
info:
Purpose

Builds the user-facing completion notification summarizing a completed
hydroponics control cycle.

Supports:
• Auto Fill - Auto Dose
• Manual Fill - Auto Dose
• ESP-Override dose cycles

Displays only the information relevant to the completed cycle, including
water added, nutrient doses, tank volume, and TDS before/after values.

Revision History

2026-07-10  GAL
• ISSUE-006 notification isolation fix.
• Changed notification source from flow.outside_pending_cycle to
  msg.completed_cycle.
• Each completed physical cycle now retains its own independent
  snapshot through the 10-minute mixing delay.
• Prevents a later maintenance dose from replacing or merging with
  an earlier cycle before its notification is built.

2026-07-06  GAL
• Updated notification terminology to match the new controller
  operating modes:
  - Auto Fill - Auto Dose
  - Manual Fill - Auto Dose
  - ESP-Override
• Notification titles are now selected using both the controller
  operating mode and completed event type (FILL or DOSE).
• FILL notifications display:
  - Water Added
  - Starting Volume
  - Calculated Final Volume
• DOSE notifications continue to display:
  - System Volume

2026-07-05  GAL
• FILL notifications distinguish between:
  - Starting Volume (pre-fill tank volume)
  - Calculated Final Volume (Starting Volume + Water Added)
• DOSE notifications continue to report current System Volume.

2026-06-30  GAL
• Initial implementation.

name: Notify Cycle Complete
info:
Purpose

Sends the final user notification after a hydroponics control cycle
has completed.

The notification title is supplied by `msg.title`, and the notification
body is supplied by `msg.payload` from the Build Notification Text
function.

This node does not determine notification content; it only delivers it.

Revision History

2026-07-06  GAL
• Renamed node to "Notify Cycle Complete."
• Changed notification title from a hardcoded value to `msg.title`.
• Supports dynamic titles for Auto Fill - Auto Dose,
  Manual Fill - Auto Dose, and ESP-Override cycles.

2026-06-30  GAL
• Initial implementation.

name: Snapshot Completed Cycle
info:
Purpose

Creates an independent snapshot of one completed physical hydroponics
fill or dose event.

The snapshot is carried downstream in msg.completed_cycle.

The shared flow.outside_pending_cycle slot is immediately released so a
later hardware event starts as a separate cycle instead of joining the
previous event.

Automatic and Manual cycles may continue through the 10-minute
post-mixing TDS path.

ESP-Override events may bypass the mixing delay and proceed directly
to database logging.

Revision History

2026-07-10  GAL
• ISSUE-006 logging isolation fix.
• Added independent completed-cycle snapshot.
• Releases flow.outside_pending_cycle immediately after cycle completion.
• Supports both delayed automatic-cycle logging and immediate
  ESP-Override event logging.
• Prevents consecutive physical events from being merged into one
  maintenance_log record.
